seoTitle: Lyalls Mill vs Lyndon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyalls Mill and Lyndon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lyalls Mill vs Lyndon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyalls Mill and Lyndon.
heading: Lyalls Mill vs Lyndon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyalls Mill, Western Australia and Lyndon, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lyndon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lyalls Mill (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyalls Mill or Lyndon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyalls Mill has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Lyndon scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyalls Mill scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Lyndon scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyalls Mill or Lyndon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lyndon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
